title: calicotome villosa
intro: Calicotome villosa, also known as the Hairy Calicotome, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a shrub native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Traditionally, Calicotome villosa is prepared as an infusion or decoction to be used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
